publicPurpose: Audience-facing release room map for the current Lux Veritas music doorway.
headline: The release is a room.
summary: SPMVP opens as music first, then expands into visual world, radio signal, circle access, selected drops, and creator response.

fanPath.label: Listen
fanPath.title: Start with the signal
fanPath.body: Play the public preview and let the sound establish the room.

fanPath.label: Watch
fanPath.title: Enter the visual world
fanPath.body: Move from the record into the first visual atmosphere.

fanPath.label: Join
fanPath.title: Enter the circle
fanPath.body: Request first access for private drops, rooms, and member moments.

fanPath.label: Collect
fanPath.title: Hold the object
fanPath.body: Join the drop path for music-linked goods and selected editions.

fanPath.label: Create
fanPath.title: Respond from the source
fanPath.body: Artists and creators can enter through screened submissions.

fanPath.label: Return
fanPath.title: Come back with signal
fanPath.body: Your local signal pass remembers listening, reaction, and access intent on this device.

readiness.label: Media
readiness.detail: Audio, visual, and radio preview sources are attached and monitored by live media QA.

readiness.label: Capture
readiness.detail: Join, submission, access, and drop interest paths return receipt-backed values and reporting.

readiness.label: Reporting
readiness.detail: CTA, playback, fan reaction, form, and operator summaries are available through protected reporting.

readiness.label: Public Release
readiness.detail: Public experience, capture, and core release paths are approved; refresh live evidence for each release candidate.
